---
title: "Resources"
description: "Key references, platforms, and external tools used in the Abdullah Lab."
---

# Key references

## Flow cytometry

📄 **Guidelines for the use of flow cytometry and cell sorting in immunological studies**  
Cossarizza *et al.* (2021), *European Journal of Immunology* — Third Edition

- [Open PDF (GitHub Release)](https://github.com/Eomesodermin/lab-protocols/releases/tag/cossarizza-flow-2021-v3)

---

# Core lab platforms (University Hospital Bonn)

## PyRAT (animal facility)

- 🔐 [PyRAT login](https://pyrat.ukbonn.de/pyrat/frontend/session/login)

## Flow cytometry facility tools
- 🔐 [PPMS login (University of Bonn)](https://ppms.eu/uni-bonn/login/)
- 🧪 [FluoroFinder – Bonn FCCF](https://app.fluorofinder.com/bonn-fccf)

---

# Experimental reagents and ordering

## Lab ordering and inventory

- 📦 [Quartzy – Lab requests](https://app.quartzy.com/groups/256099/requests)

---

# Computational resources

## High-performance computing (HPC)

- 🖥️ [University of Bonn HPC Wiki](https://wiki.hpc.uni-bonn.de)

---

# Misc

## Mouse identification

- [Mouse ear notch ID guide](mouse_ear_notch_id.html)

## Paper deconstruction

- [QED Bioscience](https://www.qedscience.com)

---
# Notes

:::callout-note
Some platforms (e.g. PyRAT, PPMS, Quartzy) require institutional login or VPN access when off-site.
:::
